title: Language Change - Consecutive language change
scenario: Consecutive language changes via Device Settings > Language section fail after firmware update on Poly Bluetooth device
steps: 1. Pair and connect the Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to enter Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap the Language section.
5. Select a new language from the list.
6. Observe the prompt to apply the language change via a firmware update. Confirm/initiate the update.
7. Wait for the firmware update to complete and the device to reconnect.
8. Repeat steps 4–7: navigate back to Device Settings > Language, select another language, and apply via firmware update.
9. Verify that the second language change is applied successfully after the update completes.
expected: The user can successfully change the device language multiple times in succession. Each language change applies correctly after the corresponding firmware update completes, and the device reflects the newly selected language.
